svg.text: V6355D Scanline Register Loading — Split View

g.text: — this even line's colors (Palette 0) — column order matters
— next odd line's colors (Palette 1) — safe in any column
CPU writes palette registers E2–E7 during HBLANK
Deferred open/close: session stays open across visible area
V6355D receives 6 data packets per even scanline
3 current (this line) + 3 upcoming (next line) · 13 OUTs · ~119 cycles
Odd scanline: FLIP · CLOSE · OPEN (3 OUTs · ~37 cycles)
Reset write pointer to E2, switch active palette, all within HBLANK
Electron beam draws pixels using updated palette
Each scanline shifts colors slightly → smooth vertical gradient columns
E2, E4, E6 — column order matters
E3, E5, E7 — safe in any column

svg.text: Olivetti Prodest PC1 · Yamaha V6355D · NEC V40 @ 8 MHz · CGA Mode 4 · Deferred Open/Close Pattern
